components.title: EDR (CrowdStrike Falcon)
components.description: CrowdStrike Falcon is a cloud-native endpoint detection and response (EDR) platform. It uses a single lightweight agent to provide continuous monitoring, threat detection, and automated response capabilities across endpoints, including workstations, servers, and mobile devices, leveraging artificial intelligence and behavioral analysis to identify and prevent malicious activity.

props.name: capabilities
props.value: EDR, Next-Gen Antivirus (NGAV), Threat Intelligence, Managed Threat Hunting (Falcon OverWatch)

protocols.name: https
protocols.title: HTTPS — Agent-to-Cloud communication and console access

implemented-requirements.description: CrowdStrike Falcon provides centralised endpoint monitoring and event logging. The Falcon agent collects telemetry from endpoints (including process executions, network connections, and file modifications) and streams it to the CrowdStrike cloud for analysis and long-term retention, supporting the organisation's security monitoring and forensic requirements.

CrowdStrike Falcon utilizes advanced behavioral analytics and machine learning to identify security-relevant events. The platform detects anomalies such as suspicious process parent-child relationships, credential dumping attempts, and known malicious patterns, ensuring that identified threats are logged with sufficient detail for investigation and response.

CrowdStrike Falcon provides real-time alerting on high-confidence security incidents. Alerts generated by the Falcon platform are available via the management console and can be integrated with the organisation's SIEM (e.g., Microsoft Sentinel) or notification systems (e.g., email, Slack) to ensure the security operations team can respond promptly to detected threats.
